extension.summary: Samsung DeX desktop on Kodi via scrcpy
extension.description: Stream the Samsung DeX desktop (or a scrcpy virtual desktop) to Kodi over USB or WiFi. Mirrors the DeX display directly with scrcpy --display-id (auto-detected), or creates a virtual desktop with --new-display on devices without an active DeX session. No root, no miraclecast, no network reconfiguration. Inspired by TuxDex.
extension.disclaimer: Requires a Samsung device with DeX and USB/wireless debugging enabled. Binaries are provided by the scrcpy Launcher addon.
extension.news: v1.0.0 (2026-06-12) - Initial release - Mirror the Samsung DeX desktop over USB or ADB-over-WiFi - Auto-detect the DeX display id (scrcpy --list-displays) - Virtual desktop mode (scrcpy 3.x --new-display) for devices without an active DeX session - LibreELEC (auto Kodi stop/restart) and Flatpak Kodi support - Audio via scrcpy, phone-screen-off and stay-awake options
